title: Excavator driver
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: Previous experience as an excavator driver
what_we_offer: Works in Sotkamo in the mining area
Accommodation if needed
Start work soon
Work until autumn
Competitive salary based on experience
Were you interested? Send your application and tell us about your skills as soon as possible.
For more information, please contact Antti Pääkkönen on 050 444 4467
jobcontent:
Excavator driver Sotkamo (mining area)

We are looking for a professional excavator driver to work in the mining area in Sotkamo. Temporary work is available with a quick start until autumn.

Job description:
The tasks include using an excavator in the earthworks of the mining area. The work requires care, compliance with safety regulations and the ability to work independently in varying conditions.

We require:

 * Previous experience as an excavator driver
 * 3D machine control skills
 * A valid work security card
 * Good work attitude and responsibility

We offer:

 * Works in Sotkamo in the mining area
 * Accommodation if necessary
 * Start work quickly
 * Work until autumn
 * Competitive salary based on experience

Were you interested? Send your application and tell us about your skills as soon as possible.

For more information, please contact Antti Pääkkönen on 050 444 4467

Nordrec is a personnel services company founded in 2022. At Nordrecilais, we have solid experience in recruitment, personnel leasing and entrepreneurship. We don't indulge in useless phrases, but we talk about things directly, we act flexibly, transparently and reliably. We want to grow and succeed together with our customers and employees. We serve customers and job seekers all over Finland, and in addition, there are job opportunities in projects in EU countries and Norway.

title: Project manager for construction logistics Espoo
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: Understanding of working with cranes and experience on sites where reachers and moonwalkers have been used
Good Finnish and English language skills
what_we_offer: A responsible and independent role in an interesting construction site
A long-term project and the possibility of a longer employment relationship
The opportunity to influence the practices and development of the site
Salary by agreement, depending on your previous experience. The work is supposed to start during May.

RTK-Henkilöstöpalvelu helps employees and employers find each other quickly and straightforwardly. We know the needs of working life very well, which enables our excellent hit accuracy. This is how we help our customers succeed in a changing working life.
jobcontent:
We are looking for an experienced foreman for our client for construction logistics tasks in Espoo. In this position, you are responsible for managing and organizing the logistics work of the construction site in close cooperation with other stakeholders of the site. You play a central role in ensuring the smoothness of everyday life on the construction site and are mainly responsible for the daily communication on the construction site.

Your duties include e.g.:

 * Management and coordination of material flows
 * Responsibility for the use and management of the systems used on the site
 * Organization of hauling, clearing and waste management
 * Maintaining the cleanliness and safety of the construction site
 * Practical management of site services
 * Daily communication with different parties on the site, such as the main contractor

We expect from you:

 * Experience in construction logistics management
 * Understanding of working with cranes and experience on sites where reachers and moonwalkers have been used
 * Good organizational and management skills
 * Solution-oriented and self-initiated approach
 * Good knowledge of Finnish and English

We offer you:

 * Responsible and independent role in an interesting construction site
 * A long-term project and the possibility of a longer employment relationship
 * The opportunity to influence the practices and development of the site

Salary by agreement, depending on your previous experience. The work is supposed to start during May.

If the position piqued your interest, submit your application, CV and salary expectations via the attached link. For more information about the position, please contact our HR expert Emma Liukkonen, emma.liukkonen@rtkhenkistopalvelu.fi <mailto:emma.janhonen@rtkhenkistopalvelu.fi> / tel. 044 412 4189

RTK-Henkilöstöpalvelu helps employees and employers find each other quickly and straightforwardly. We know the needs of working life very well, which enables our excellent hit accuracy. This is how we help our customers succeed in a changing working life.

For our employees, we are a reliable and flexible employer that monitors your interests and is present and supportive in your everyday life. We support our employees' voluntary recreational activities by offering the Edenred exercise and culture benefit. In addition, employees have access to an extensive personnel benefit program and always new job offers when necessary.

We are always looking for jobs, check out the range of jobs, fill out an application or contact us and let us take care of the rest: www.rtkhenkilostopalvelu.fi/avoimet-tyopakait/ <http://www.rtkhenkilostopalvelu.fi/avoimet-tyopalikat/>

title: Chef (Malay Cuisine)
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
what_we_offer: Permanent full-time employment
Competitive salary depending on experience
jobcontent:
Street Canteen is a restaurant in Finland specializing in Malaysian street food. Our goal is to offer authentic flavors and traditional manufacturing methods. Our kitchen is run by chefs with a strong background in Malaysian cuisine. We are looking for experienced chefs from Malaysia with strong practical knowledge of authentic Malaysian food. The position is suitable for people with education and/or long work experience specifically in Malaysian cuisine.

**Job Duties**

- Prepares authentic Malaysian dishes with high quality
 
- Master traditional recipes, spice mixes and preparation techniques
 
- Maintains consistent quality and hygiene in daily work
 
- Work together with the chef in developing the menu
 

**Requirements**

- **Work experience in Malaysian cuisine**
 
- Experience in preparing traditional dishes such as nasi lemak, char kway teow, laksa, rendang, roti canai, etc.
 
- Strong knowledge of Malaysian ingredients, spices and manufacturing techniques
 
- Education in the field or similar practical experience in Malaysian kitchens
 
- Ability to work in a busy environment
 
- Basic English language skills
 

**We offer**

- Permanent full-time employment
 
- Competitive salary depending on experience

Send your application and CV to: ni.nguyen@streetcanteen.fi

- Detailed work experience in Malaysian cuisine
 
- List of dishes you know how to cook
 
- Recommenders from previous jobs

Street Canteen is a restaurant in Finland specializing in Malaysian street food. Our goal is to offer authentic flavors and traditional manufacturing methods. Our kitchen is run by chefs with a strong background in Malaysian cuisine. We are looking for experienced chefs from Malaysia with strong practical knowledge of authentic Malaysian food. The position is suitable for people with education and/or long work experience specifically in Malaysian cuisine.

**Job Duties**

- Prepares authentic Malaysian dishes with high quality
 
- Master traditional recipes, spice mixes and preparation techniques
 
- Maintains consistent quality and hygiene in daily work
 
- Work together with the chef in developing the menu
 

**Requirements**

- **Work experience in Malaysian cuisine**
 
- Experience in preparing traditional dishes such as nasi lemak, char kway teow, laksa, rendang, roti canai, etc.
 
- Strong knowledge of Malaysian ingredients, spices and manufacturing techniques
 
- Education in the field or similar practical experience in Malaysian kitchens
 
- Ability to work in a busy environment
 
- Basic English language skills
 

**We offer**

- Permanent full-time employment
 
- Competitive salary depending on experience

Send your application and CV to: ni.nguyen@streetcanteen.fi

- Detailed work experience in Malaysian cuisine
 
- List of dishes you know how to cook
 
- Recommenders from previous jobs

title: Painters and sandblasters for the shipbuilding industry
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
We are looking for skilled painters and sandblasters to work in the shipbuilding industry at Turku and Rauma shipyards. The tasks consist of painting the interior and exterior surfaces of ships.

The applicant is required to have previous experience in painting and sandblasting work (preferably in a shipyard/ship industry) as well as accuracy, care and compliance with safety instructions. The job requires good physical condition and readiness for shift work. In addition, we value good teamwork skills and the ability to work effectively as part of a work group. The working time is about 40 hours a week. The occupational safety card must be valid.

Apply for a job via the link below.
translated_content:
Painters and sandblasters for the shipbuilding industry

We are looking for skilled painters and sandblasters to work in the shipbuilding industry at Turku and Rauma shipyards. The tasks consist of painting the interior and exterior surfaces of ships.

The applicant is required to have previous experience in painting and sandblasting work (preferably in a shipyard/ship industry) as well as accuracy, care and compliance with safety instructions. The job requires good physical condition and readiness for shift work. In addition, we value good teamwork skills and the ability to work effectively as part of a work group. The working time is about 40 hours a week. The occupational safety card must be valid.

title: Parking supervisor for the Oulu area
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: to take care of public safety
jobcontent:
Are you interested in independent and responsible work? Now you have the opportunity to become a parking supervisor and influence the safety of our urban environment and the smoothness of movement! The work offers meaningful work with a working community that supports you. 

Few of us are born parking attendants. 

There are many of us individuals. That's why we want you to be a part of our community exactly as you are, and our trainers who have received great feedback will familiarize you carefully. From us, you get good skills, great friends and the support of a supervisor for your development at work. 

Job description and salary 

In your work, you mainly deal with illegal parking by going around and monitoring many of our sites. You get to take over different circuits as things start to flow, so no two days are the same. There are many types of destinations in ParkkiPate, such as hotels, hospitals, shopping centers and commercial properties. 

We do continuous development work to modernize the parking sector at all different levels. For us, service quality is a matter of honor. Information travels quickly thanks to our good systems, and work in the field is also smoother. In addition, you get a lunch allowance and your vehicle is a low-emission Toyota hybrid. 

The work is shift work and the shifts are generally between 6am and 2pm and 2pm and 10pm. You will also have at least one free weekend per month. We strive for regularity in shift planning and to accommodate requests as equally as possible. The supervisor has an hourly salary, and the size of the salary is influenced by the supervisor's previous experience as a parking supervisor or district guard. Possible additional earnings can also be pursued by doing training shifts or overtime. 

Would you be good for a parking attendant? 

Care and precision are important in this work. You also don't get anxious about customer situations and you get along well with people. The job requires excellent knowledge of the Finnish language (spoken and read). Naturally, the job also includes driving to some extent, so we require the applicant to be of legal age and have at least one year of driving experience in a vehicle. Alternatively, you may have had a driver's license for at least two years and your driving experience has been regular, e.g. daily work trips by vehicle. A parking supervisor is needed to keep the escape routes free, the places for disabled people in use for those who need them, and the residents', guest's and customer's places in their use. You help make parking easy and smooth for everyone. 

If you are interested in the position, you can easily fill out the application form at https://www.parkkipate.fi/rekry/pysakoinninvalvoja 

Please apply soon, because interviews will already be conducted within the application period and the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found. If that's you, we can't wait for you to join our energetic and busy team!

ParkkiPate is a nationwide producer of parking solutions. Our customer base includes a growing number of e.g. hotels, hospitals, shopping centers and commercial properties. Since 2010, we have delivered complete parking solutions to our customers all over Finland.

We are happy to serve you with our 200 trained and professional staff. Our turnover in the fiscal year ending in 2024 was more than 15 million euros.

Please use the application form when applying for a position. You can attach your CV to the form or alternatively fill in your work experience manually. Tell us about yourself and why you would make a good parking supervisor? Let's go back!

title: Surveyor, Lapland Katsastuspalvelu Oy, Keminmaa
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
Lapin Katsastuspalvelu Oy is a private inspection station in Keminmaa that offers vehicle inspection services with modern equipment and a customer-oriented approach. 
Lapland's Inspection Service serves locally and flexibly.

Now looking for a brisk and flexible part-time light vehicle inspector for our client Lapin Katsastuspalvelu! 

As an inspector, you get to work on periodic inspections and inspections of vehicles, assess the condition and safety of vehicles, and document inspection decisions. The work is independent and responsible.

The work is part-time and the number of hours is about 80 hours per month, and therefore can be easily combined with various life situations, for which the office working time does not fit for some reason. 
Work shifts are on even-numbered weeks on Fridays and Saturdays from 8:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m., 
on odd-numbered weeks on Mondays and Saturdays from 8:00 to 18:00, and if you wish, you can also do Sunday shifts. It is also possible to do evening shifts at 18:00-21:00, which increases the number of monthly hours. Later, it is possible to become a full-time employee when the new office is completed.

You are expected to:
- MAK permits for light equipment
- precise and careful approach
-good interaction and customer service skills
- the ability to work systematically and independently
-experience in inspection tasks is considered an advantage.

The person selected for the position will be offered:
- modern equipment and a modern work environment
- self-directed work in a nice and encouraging team
- the possibility of flexible working hours and increasing hours
- the possibility to later become a full-time employee
-assisting in the purchase of an apartment if necessary
-salary according to experience and skills + possible bonus.

Applying:
Please submit your application as soon as possible through Wippii Work's recruitment system, because we interview applicants already during the application period and the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

More information about the task is given by:
HR expert Tita Vuoksenturja
 +358 40 843 2149
 tita.vuoksenturja@wippiiwork.com

Apply for the position via the attached link.

title: Foreman/project manager, Turun Sähkö ja Automaatio Oy, Parainen
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
Turun Sähkö ja Automaatio Oy is an electrical company operating in Varsinais-Finland, which carries out electrical installations in a wide range of areas, from industry to commercial premises, educational institutions, apartment buildings, renovation projects and ship-side projects. The company is particularly known for its reliable and customer-oriented way of working.

We are now looking for an experienced electrical foreman / project manager for our client for a permanent employment.

At work, you are responsible for the progress of electrical projects and contracts from start to finish, you participate in contract calculations and tender requests, and you develop and maintain customer relationships, including new customer acquisition. You act as a link between the installers and the management and ensure that the construction sites progress on schedule and that the resources are in order. In everyday life, you manage several projects at the same time and are able to keep the whole thing together even in the midst of a rush.

We expect from you:
-education in the electrical field and experience in managerial tasks or leading projects
-customer-oriented and strong work ethic and good communication skills
- fluent Finnish and understanding of technical English

To our advantage, we consider:
-design expertise or experience in electrical design
-experience with the Admicom calculation program
-knowledge of the Swedish language

The person selected for the position will be offered a responsible and varied role in a stable company with flexible working hours, leisure time accident insurance and the opportunity to influence their own job description. The salary is determined according to experience and skills, and the level of difficulty of the task is taken into account in the salary. Orientation takes place in Paraini, and the work sites are mainly located in the Varsinais-Suomi region.

 Were you interested?
Please submit your application as soon as possible through our recruitment system, because we interview applicants already during the application period and the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found. It is a direct recruitment, and the person selected for the position will be employed by our client company.

More information about the task is given by:
HR expert Tita Vuoksenturja
 +358 40 843 2149
 tita.vuoksenturja@wippiiwork.com

Apply for the position via the attached link.

At work, you are responsible for the progress of electrical projects and contracts from start to finish, you participate in contract calculations and tender requests, and you develop and maintain customer relationships, including new customer acquisition. title: Electrician, Turun Sähkö ja Automaatio Oy, Parainen
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
Turun Sähkö ja Automaatio Oy is an electrical company operating in Varsinais-Finland, which carries out electrical installations in a wide range of areas, from industry to commercial premises, educational institutions, apartment buildings, renovation projects and ship-side projects. The company is particularly known for its reliable and customer-oriented way of working.

We are now looking for an experienced electrician for our client for a permanent employment relationship.

At work, you work as part of a work group in various electrical installation and contract sites in the Varsinais-Suomi region. The targets vary from smaller maintenance gigs to extensive contracts, so you get to use your skills in a variety of ways. Understanding contract work and the ability to work at the contract pace are important in the task, as the work is done in close cooperation with the rest of the team. If necessary, you also work independently in smaller installations.

We expect from you:
-electrical education and previous experience as an installer
-ability to read drawings and a safe work grip
-willingness to work in a team as well as the ability to manage gigs independently
- valid electricity and occupational safety cards (or readiness to update them)

To our advantage, we consider:
-experience in contract work
-extensive experience in various installation sites

The person selected for the position will be offered a permanent job in a stable company where there is enough work all year round. Salary is determined according to the TES of the electrical industry, based on experience and competence, and there is a possibility of bonuses in contract sites. In addition, Paraisten Valo offers leisure accident insurance, versatile destinations in the Varsinais-Suomi region, and a comfortable and supportive work community.

 Were you interested?
Please submit your application as soon as possible through our recruitment system, because we interview applicants already during the application period and the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found. It is a direct recruitment, and the person selected for the position will be employed by our client company.

More information about the task is given by:
HR expert Tita Vuoksenturja
 +358 40 843 2149
 tita.vuoksenturja@wippiiwork.com

Apply for a job via the attached link.
